title: The Disappearance That Left No Trace

scenes.text: A plane vanishes from radar, leaving families in heartbreak.
It happened over Lake Michigan, during a stormy night in 1950.
The disappearance of Flight 2501 involved 58 passengers and crew. No wreckage was ever found.
The case remains one of the most mysterious aviation incidents.
No survivors and no trace; it remains a haunting mystery.
scenes.label: NO TRACE REMAINS

scenes.text: Follow for daily true crime mysteries.

description: 📍 Lake Michigan, USA - 1950. Flight 2501 disappeared without a trace, carrying 58 souls. No wreckage has ever been found. Follow for daily cold cases!
